sections.subtitle: Team Form Analysis
sections.text: Real Madrid have shown strong attacking form in their last 5 matches, scoring 12 goals, with Kylian Mbappé in exceptional shape (8 goals). Real Sociedad, however, have struggled, managing only 3 goals in their last 5 matches and conceding heavily (8 goals). This indicates a clear disparity in current form.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Analysis
sections.text: In the last 2 head-to-head matches, Real Madrid have had the upper hand with a win and a high-scoring draw (4-4). Matches between these teams often produce tight results with over 4.5 cards and frequent corners (over 10.5 in 4/5 games).

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics Overview
sections.text: Real Madrid rank 2nd in La Liga for goals scored (76) and have a strong home record at the Bernabéu. Real Sociedad, sitting 11th, have struggled offensively (35 goals) and defensively, especially away. Madrid's superior ball possession (60.4%) and attacking stats heavily favor them.

sections.subtitle: Key Player Impact
sections.text: Kylian Mbappé's form (29 goals, 7.68 rating) is a major threat for Real Madrid, despite missing key players like Bellingham and Rodrygo. Real Sociedad miss impactful players like Óskarsson, and their attacking output remains limited without key contributors.
